name: Fluffy Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
--------------
1. Melt the margarine and chocolate chips together, then remove from heat.
2. Stir in the rice cereal and press into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Add sweetened condensed milk and peanut butter, combining well.
5. Stir in lemon juice and vanilla extract.
6. Fold in beaten whipping cream and pour over the crust.
7. Drizzle 1 or 2 tablespoons of chocolate syrup over the top.
8. Chill for at least 4 hours before serving.
